title: Open Sesame
body:
Now when opening doors if the door is part of a double door then both doors will open together.

This functionality extends to players, villagers, redstone, and wind charges.

![A short video of iron doors being opened by a pressure plate, copper doors being opened by a wind charge, and finally oak doors being open the player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/J9p0oSxv/images/6b77fe7cf7af5442a7a51d42eeeeb605983171d3.webp)
